variants: Diana Hrebenciuc is a distinguished instructional design expert known for her contributions to the field. Diana is also a member of the Citrine String Twisters, where she engages her hobbyist interests. Her academic journey was shaped under the mentorship of Hazal Ozgen, who served as her doctoral advisor.
